prompt: A realistic nighttime street photo shot as a mirror selfie through a large roadside convex traffic mirror, vertical 3:4 composition, with the entire circular mirror filling the frame and no black empty border outside the reflected scene. Use a strong fisheye lens and a slightly exaggerated dome-mirror effect so the road, scaffolding, poles, buildings, and lane markings bend heavily toward the edges. At the bottom center of the reflection, show a young person from about waist up taking the photo, wearing a {argument name="jacket style" default="black leather jacket"}, with short dark hair, small silver hoop earrings, and 2 visible silver rings, holding a {argument name="phone model" default="white iPhone 15 Pro Max"} up to cover most of the face. The subject stands casually with one hand in a pocket, centered in the mirror. The street is wet and glossy, reflecting intense red light. Include 1 moving dark car crossing the curved road from left to right with subtle motion blur and bright red taillight streaks. Surround the road with dense construction scaffolding and striped barriers; show exactly 2 red-and-yellow diagonal road barriers along the right and upper-right curve and additional striped safety panels around the left side. Include 3 clearly visible red traffic lights glowing in the background. Across the top arc, place a scaffold-wrapped building with large bright red Chinese neon signage. Lighting is dominated by red neon signs and street lamps, casting saturated red highlights across the asphalt and metal structures. The mood is cinematic, urban, candid, and realistic, with a gritty night-street atmosphere in an East Asian city.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实的夜间街头照片，通过路边的大型凸面交通镜拍摄的镜像自拍，采用 3:4 竖构图，整个圆形镜面填满画面，反射场景外无黑色空边。使用强力鱼眼镜头和略微夸张的圆顶镜面效果，使道路、脚手架、电线杆、建筑物和车道线向边缘大幅弯曲。在反射画面的底部中心，展示一位腰部以上的年轻人正在拍照，身穿 {argument name="jacket style" default="黑色皮夹克"}，留着深色短发，戴着小巧的银色圆环耳环和 2 枚显眼的银色戒指，手持 {argument name="phone model" default="白色 iPhone 15 Pro Max"} 遮住大半张脸。主体单手插兜，随意地站在镜子中央。街道湿润且富有光泽，反射着强烈的红光。画面中包含 1 辆正在从左向右穿过弯道的深色汽车，带有细微的动态模糊和明亮的红色尾灯拖影。道路四周环绕着密集的建筑脚手架和条纹护栏；在右侧和右上方的弯道处准确展示 2 个红黄相间的斜纹道路护栏，左侧配有额外的条纹安全板。背景中包含 3 个清晰可见的红色交通信号灯。在顶部弧线处，放置一栋被脚手架包裹的建筑，上面有巨大的亮红色中文霓虹灯招牌。光影以红色霓虹灯和路灯为主，在沥青路面和金属结构上投射出饱和的红色高光。整体氛围具有电影感、都市感、抓拍感和写实感，呈现出东亚城市粗粝的街头夜色。

breakdown.creativeCore: 凸面镜街头夜景自拍：此提示词可生成一张极具电影质感的写实鱼眼自拍，画面呈现于路边凸面镜中，非常适合城市夜景摄影及街头风格人像创作。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, lens]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
